title: Mediterranean Sweet Potato Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired pilaf dish made with sweet potatoes, pilaf, and a hint of mediterranean spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add the pilaf and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the sweet potatoes, cumin, coriander, and paprika. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the fluffy white rice and stir well.
Reduce heat to low and cover the pan with a lid.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
